description: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as GP Investments Acquisition Corp. II and changed its name to GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. in November 2020. GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2020 and is based in New York, New York.
